promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the prior A2-mid trajectory-metrics batch deferred this suite family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: pair identity, local-suite-versus-descendant admission, delta-only evidence versus full lattice storage, direction-sensitive SEQ04 behavior, Bell-versus-Ginibre suite negativity asymmetry, and near-sign-symmetry with residuals.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The immediately preceding trajectory A2-mid batch provides the Bell-versus-Ginibre split style, the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern, and the Bell-seed batch provides a nearby anomaly-preservation style.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is the next residual pair and must stay outside this bounded axis0 suite pass.
Not selected because it would erase the metrics-versus-suite boundary and the local-suite-versus-descendant seam preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent trajectory-suite batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable shell, descendant seam, evidence compression seam, direction-sensitive anomaly, regime split, and near-symmetry packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_TRAJ_SUITE_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the signed directional trajectory-suite residual pair.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_SUITE_VS_V4V5_DESCENDANT_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest local-suite-versus-descendant admission seam under shared runner hash continuity.

candidate_items.name: DELTA_EVIDENCE_VS_FULL_LATTICE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest compression seam between emitted delta evidence and full 32-case storage.

candidate_items.name: SEQ04_DIRECTION_FLIP_ANOMALY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest direction-sensitive local-case anomaly in the Bell regime.

candidate_items.name: BELL_GINIBRE_SUITE_NEGATIVITY_FIELD_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest suite-level Bell-versus-Ginibre negativity split.

candidate_items.name: NEAR_SIGN_SYMMETRY_WITH_NONZERO_RESIDUAL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-overstatement packet between broad sign symmetry and exact symmetry.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_SUITE_AS_REPOTOP_ADMITTED_VIA_CODE_HASH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shared runner hash is weaker than local-suite SIM_ID admission because the repo-held pack omits the local suite SIM_ID.

quarantined_items.name: DELTA_EVIDENCE_BLOCK_AS_FULL_32CASE_SURFACE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The emitted evidence block is weaker than the full stored lattice because it compresses the 32-case surface into SEQ01-relative deltas.

quarantined_items.name: SEQ04_AS_DIRECTION_INVARIANT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: SEQ04 identity is weaker than direction-qualified behavior because REV stores the strongest Bell anomaly while FWD is materially weaker.

quarantined_items.name: BELL_AND_GINIBRE_AS_ONE_AVERAGED_NEGATIVITY_FIELD
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: One suite lattice is weaker than one averaged field because Bell keeps nonzero negativity and Ginibre keeps zero across the suite.

quarantined_items.name: EXACT_SIGN_SYMMETRY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Broad sign-reversal similarity is weaker than exact symmetry because stored residuals remain nonzero.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the trajectory-suite batch without reopening raw sims files.

They keep pair identity, descendant admission seam, evidence compression seam, direction-sensitive anomaly, Bell-versus-Ginibre field split, and near-sign-symmetry caution distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain admission-overreads, coverage-overreads, direction-collapse overreads, regime-flattening overreads, or exact-symmetry overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
